profile.name: Risanth Sivarajah
profile.headline: Software Engineering Co-op student and full-stack developer
profile.availability: Seeking Software Engineering co-op opportunities for upcoming terms. Open to remote, hybrid, or relocation.
strengths: Full-stack development across frontend and backend systems
Building scalable APIs and optimizing performance
Translating business requirements into technical solutions
Strong communication of technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders

impact_metrics.metric: Improved transaction success rate by 35% through Stripe integration and backend optimization
Enhanced API performance and database efficiency across onboarding workflows
Reduced load times through optimized REST APIs and backend data flow design
Improved SEO and mobile responsiveness across multiple websites

domain_knowledge: Risk systems architecture and data integrity controls
Full-stack dashboards for monitoring metrics and workflows
AI integration in applications (content generation, recommendations)
Cloud-based system design using AWS services
RESTful API design and microservices architecture
Data pipelines and backend performance optimization

behavioral_stories.title: Handling feedback and improving communication
behavioral_stories.situation: Manager noted I tried solving everything independently without asking enough questions
behavioral_stories.action: Started proactively clarifying requirements early, aligning with stakeholders, and validating assumptions before building
behavioral_stories.result: Reduced rework and improved delivery speed while strengthening team collaboration

behavioral_stories.title: Building scalable systems
behavioral_stories.situation: Initial implementations worked but did not consider long-term scalability
behavioral_stories.action: Refactored APIs and database queries to handle growth and improve performance
behavioral_stories.result: Improved system responsiveness and prepared platform for increased usage

project_details.name: SGMC Platform
project_details.architecture: Full-stack system with Next.js frontend, Node.js backend, PostgreSQL database, deployed on AWS
technical_decisions: Used PostgreSQL for relational data consistency

project_details.name: RotateOps

Integrated Slack API for workflow automation

Designed scalable REST APIs for user interaction

chunks.title: Ontario Tech University
chunks.text: Bachelor of Engineering (BEng), Software Engineering Co-op (Honours), Ontario Tech University, Sep 2023 to Apr 2027, Oshawa ON. Coursework includes Algorithms, Data Structures, Databases, Object-Oriented Programming, Artificial Intelligence, Software Architecture, Computer Networks, and Systems Programming.

chunks.title: SGMC Canada - Full-Stack Developer
chunks.text: Engineered a full-stack recruitment platform using Next.js, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Built onboarding flows, role-based access control, and dashboards. Integrated Stripe payments and deployed services on AWS EC2 and S3, improving transaction success rates by 35%. Optimized backend APIs and database queries for scalability and performance.

chunks.title: Solora Tech - Full-Stack Developer
chunks.text: Developed and deployed a scalable full-stack platform using React, Node.js, and Express. Designed REST APIs and optimized backend data flows to reduce load times and improve responsiveness. Delivered reliable end-to-end features through strong frontend-backend integration.

chunks.title: LEX Marketing Inc. - Web Developer
chunks.text: Redesigned websites with modern UI/UX principles. Migrated platforms from Weebly to WordPress. Improved SEO and mobile responsiveness, increasing accessibility and performance.

chunks.title: RotateOps
chunks.text: Built a workflow automation platform to manage rotation-based task assignment. Implemented REST APIs and real-time updates. Integrated Slack API to automate notifications and improve team visibility.

chunks.title: NovaPrep
chunks.text: Developed an AI-powered exam platform with dynamic question generation and adaptive learning features. Built scalable backend services and integrated AI-driven feedback systems.

chunks.title: ForgeFit
chunks.text: Built a cross-platform fitness app with React Native and TypeScript. Implemented authentication, storage, and AI-powered nutrition insights.

chunks.title: Technical Skills
chunks.text: Languages: C, C++, C#, Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL. Frameworks: React, Node.js, Next.js, Express, .NET, FastAPI, Flask, React Native. Cloud: AWS, GCP, Azure. Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Git, Power BI.
